3324240.name: Valsa das Macaúbas
3324240.description:
Step Into the Dance of Time - Relive Porto Nacional in 1917

In a Brazil of another era, where faith, traditions, and mysteries intertwine, you are invited to embark on a unique journey. Valsa das Macaúbas is not just a game – it’s an immersion into history, through cobblestone streets and secrets that echo within the walls of Porto Nacional. Get ready to uncover the unexpected and dance between the real and the fantastical

Conversations that connect you to the mystery

Explore Three Mystery-Filled Locations

  • Between light and shadow, explore Caetanato, Catacombs, and Church.

🕯️ Features

A Story Set in the Heart of Old Brazil

  • Explore a dark narrative inspired by legends, mysteries, and memories from the countryside of northern Goiás (now Tocantins), with environments that evoke a forgotten time — from ancient churches and stifling catacombs to the enigmatic Caetanato.

Puzzles and Secrets Lurking in the Shadows

  • Solve environmental puzzles that block your path, interact with objects, and uncover hidden clues. Each puzzle reveals a new piece of the past and helps you understand the story more deeply.

A World Between the Real and the Supernatural

  • Face environments filled with symbolism and psychological tension. Light and darkness dance in every scene, and there is always more than meets the eye.

Dangerous Encounters

  • Not everything along your journey is meant to be understood — some encounters require silence, escape, or bravery. Stay alert and prepare to face what lurks in the shadows.

Original Soundtrack and Immersive Atmosphere

  • From religious chants to mysterious arrangements, the soundtrack of Valsa das Macaúbas accompanies every step with sounds that echo from the earth, the spirit, and memory itself.
3324240.supported_languages:
英语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
